description:
HOW TO FILE COMPLAINT AGAINST INSURANCE COMPANY | INSURANCE CLAIM REJECTED COMPLAINTS #insurance
#insuranceclaim #lawbyak 


Hello everyone,
My name is Advocate Aman Kishore and welcome to my YouTube channel⤵️
"LAW BY AK".

ABOUT THIS VIDEO:

In this video I talked about how to file online complaint against insurance company if your insurance claim gets rejected.
Insurance claim rejection can be a frustrating and challenging experience for policyholders. It occurs when an insurance company denies coverage for a claim submitted by the policyholder. This rejection can happen due to various reasons, including insufficient documentation, policy exclusions, inaccurate information, or failure to meet specific policy requirements. Dealing with a claim rejection often involves understanding the reasons for denial, providing additional evidence or information if possible, and appealing the decision through the insurance company's formal grievance process. After watching this video, you can file a complaint against insurance company on your own if your claim gets rejected. For more information, watch the complete video.

QUERIES SOLVED-

1. How to file online complaint against insurance company.
2. What to do if your insurance claim gets rejected.
3. How to file complaint in the grievance cell of the insurance company.
4. How to file complaint to (IRDAI) Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India.
5. How to file online complaint to (CIO) Council for Insurance Ombudsman.
6. How to send legal notice to the insurance company.
7. How to file consumer court case against insurance company.

MORE VIDEOS FROM LAW BY AK:

1. HOW TO FILE COMPLAINT TO LABOUR COMMISSIONER : https://youtu.be/a8sQLxM0Pro

2. HOW TO FILE CASE IN CONSUMER COURT THROUGH EDAAKHIL : https://youtu.be/OjhEnN9f3Mc

3. HOW TO TAKE DIVORCE IN INDIA: https://youtu.be/rK916BNt8F8

4. HOW TO FILE COMPLAINT IN MUNICIPAL CORPORATION : https://youtu.be/yRyu-MwQBoc

5. HOW TO FILE COMPLAINT AGAINST ANY GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEE : 
https://youtu.be/uDWzBCYIOeY

6. HOW TO FILE COMPLAINT AGAINST NEIGHBOUR : https://youtu.be/9ONF1t4cajg


FOR FREE CONSULTATION⤵️
DROP A MAIL FOR ANY QUERY:
queries.lawbyak@gmail.com

DROP A MAIL FOR BUSINESS / COLLABORATIONS:
business.lawbyak@gmail.com

(You can get many more useful and informative videos on our channel, join in for FREE by clicking the "SUBSCRIBE BUTTON".)

comments.text:
Good morning sir 
Obudsman favaour me and asking to pay company 

At the time of discharge, the care company approved only ₹2,60,000, leaving us to pay the remaining ₹1.44 lakhs to the hospital. Unfortunately, due to the challenges of that day—a Sunday and heavy rains in Ahmedabad—I was unable to arrange the full amount. With help from friends and relatives, I managed to gather ₹1.05 lakhs, which was paid to the hospital.

Understanding my financial situation, the doctor kindly allowed me to pay the remaining balance in installments.

So i dont have pending mony reciept 
Company repeatly asked for it and hold all amount

What will i do now ?

bhai myne rv400 li thi april 2023 mi hdfc ergo insurance aur December mi claim kia aur jan mi claim reject kar diya ek mahina grievance ke baad lawyer se baat kar ke Notice bejhwaya aur ek hafte ka time Diya tha kuch reply nahi aaya to fir lawyer ke saath mil ke sab Proof Ikhatta kia aur Consumer court mi case kar diya . Pahle do hearing mi vo log nahi aaya aur tisri hearing mi aa kar sab proof ka galat bola ayse hi total 10 hearing hui. 25 Oct ko Last hearing aur Result aaya , 30k ke claim pe 1 lakh company ko mujhe Dena pada.
30k for claim , 45 for lawyer and other for mental harrasment😢


Mujhe sirf 2 baar hi court jana pada, lawyer ne hi sujh bhuj kar sab dekha

Company ne out of court settlement pe bhi dabav kia but myne kuch nahi kia

hello sir.
"I need help with a car insurance issue. I have a policy from Tata AIG Insurance, purchased through Policy Boss, but there's an error in the policy document. They've listed the fuel type as 'Petrol' instead of 'Petrol/CNG', even though my car has a company-fitted CNG kit. Now, after an accident, they're rejecting my claim due to this mistake. I've provided my car's RC as proof, but the insurance company is unhelpful, saying the employee responsible has left the company. Can you please guide me on how to resolve this issue and get my claim approved?"
